synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23314 Oracle Linux 9 passt bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23314
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23314

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23314.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
passt-0^20250512.g8ec1341-4.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
passt-selinux-0^20250512.g8ec1341-4.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
passt-0^20250512.g8ec1341-4.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
passt-selinux-0^20250512.g8ec1341-4.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/passt-0^20250512.g8ec1341-4.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0^20250512.g8ec1341-4]
- Resolves: RHEL-123413 RHEL-123419

[0^20250512.g8ec1341-2]
- Resolves: RHEL-106326

[0^20250512.g8ec1341-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-84283

[0^20250320.g32f6212-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-84283
